title: 1st Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Film's Box Office Earnings in Japan Exceeds 40 Billion Yen
content: Image via Demon Slayer franchise's X/Twitter account©Koyoharu Gotoge / SHUEISHA, Aniplex, ufotableDemon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle - Akaza Sairai, the first film in the Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle trilogy, has sold over 27.34 million tickets for 40.02 billion yen (about US$250.7…
author: ANN

title: 'Nippon Sangoku' Unveils Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Third Promo
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ikka Matsuki 's Nippon Sangoku manga unveiled additional cast, a special visual (pictured), the ending theme, and third promotional video on Monday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on April 7 at 12:00 a.m.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Glen Powell Voices Fox McCloud in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
content: Entertainment news website Variety reported on Friday that actor Glen Powell will voice Fox McCloud in Nintendo, Illumination, and Universal Pictures' The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, the sequel to The Super Mario Bros. Movie. Powell also posted a video announcement on his Instagram account.
author: ANN

title: AnimeJapan Reports Record Attendance in 2026
content: Image via AnimeJapan's X/Twitter account©AnimeJapan 2026The staff for the AnimeJapan 2026 convention announced on Sunday that 156,000 attendees came to the event across its two public days on March 28-29.
author: ANN

title: Cells at Work! Cat Manga Ends
content: Image via Amazon© Akane Shimizu, Choko Aozora, Meku Kaire, Kodansha, Kodansha USAThe May issue of Kodansha's Monthly Shonen Sirius magazine published the final chapter of Choko Aozora and Meku Kaire's Cells at Work! Cat manga on March 26.
author: ANN

title: Fate/strange Fake Novels' Final Volume Ships This Summer
content: Image via Amazon© Ryohgo Narita, Type-Moon, KadokawaThe official X/Twitter account for Kadokawa's Dengeki Bunko label announced on Sunday that the 10th and final volume of Ryohgo Narita's Fate/strange Fake spinoff novels will debut this summer.
author: ANN

title: MAPPA CEO Opens Up on Past Fears of Going Bankrupt, Failures, Yuri on ICE, and Chainsaw Man Solo Funding
content: Manabu Otsuka, the CEO and president of anime studio MAPPA, penned a feature for Bungeishunju (Bunshun) Plus, where he discussed the studio’s past, present, and future, including its successes and failures. Otsuka left Studio 4°C in 2011 to join MAPPA as it was being founded.
author: Anime Corner

title: Oshi no Ko Reveals Ruby Hoshino Entertainment Work Visual
content: Strawberry Production’s Ruby Hoshino has taken on the role of dress advertisement model for the dress brand “KIYOKO HATA” and Oshi no Ko revealed an entertainment work visual on Monday.
author: Anime Corner

title: Manga Creator Rakko Dies Due to Heart Failure
content: The official X/Twitter account of manga creator and illustrator Rakko revealed on March 27 that Rakko died on March 20 due to heart failure. Rakko's brother made the announcement.
author: ANN

title: Anime Central Hosts 765PRO, Cinderella Girls Idols from The Idolm@ster
content: The Anime Central convention and Bandai Namco Entertainment announced on March 25 that the convention will host six idols from The IDOLM@STER franchise, including: Asami Imai (Chihaya Kisaragi), Akiko Hasegawa (Miki Hoshii), and Yumi Hara (Takane Shijou) from 765PRO ALL STARS; and Ayaka Fukuhara (Rin Shibuya), Ayaka…
author: ANN
